title: Create: Design n' Decor
description: a create addon that adds decor blocks to spice up your factory!
body:
[](51520f401629a93c2966a18a2b1baab0a2161821.png)

PLEASE DONT ASK DOWNPORTS/BUGFIX 1.20.1 IS DEPRECATED

 ## Overview Create: Design 'n' Decor is a Create addon focused on QOL decoration features that expand on the base decoration ability of Create whilst focusing on community feedback. It comes with variants of normal blocks, such as many new crushing wheels, containers, and extra blocks that we thought fit in well with create! ![dndecor](https://github.com/LopyLuna/LunaResources/blob/main/DnDecor.png?raw=true) [](https://discord.gg/3uPNTxFpMr)
